code:
mut c3 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut i = 1
while i <= 15
  c3 = c3 + 1
  c5 = c5 + 1
  mut is3 = false
  mut is5 = false
  if c3 == 3
    is3 = true
    c3 = 0
  end
  if c5 == 5
    is5 = true
    c5 = 0
  end
  if is3 and is5
    println("FizzBuzz")
  else if is3
    println("Fizz")
  else if is5
    println("Buzz")
  else
    println("#{i}")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
